creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text: Looking at previous attempts of doing "one-man band forks" majority of the time they end up being obsolete quickly and/or neglected due to lack of interest time etc so I don't think that should be our first attempt/priority. Looking at the fork tree have you tried asking https://github.com/stevenxxiu/sshfs or https://github.com/deadbeefsociety/sshfs if they're willing to merge your patches?
